24:41 â November 22, 2024
Update to the Wires Part
We updated the Wires Part to reflect an enhancement to support the receipt of structured remittance information in incoming wires.
Electronic Transactions Volume
Wires Part
Section 19.3, Viewing Wire Details
We added procedures for verifying if an incoming wire contains structured remittance information and how to request the XML data for your customer.
